<h2 id="2026.01.23" tabindex="-1">2026.01.23</h2>
<p>
<strong>General | New Capability: Supports intelligent completion of images from different angles of the element</strong>
</p>
<ul>
<li>Through the front view of the element, other angle images of the element can be automatically inferred, and three sets of results can be generated for selection each time.</li>
<li>Charged based on the times of service visits, with 0.5 units deducted per visit.</li>
</ul>
<p>
<strong>General | New Capability: When querying the task results, you can directly obtain the units consumed by the current task</strong>
</p>
<ul>
<li>The key of JSON parameter is: final_unit_deduction.</li>
</ul>
<p>
<strong>General | New feature: When generating images or videos, a watermark can be added simultaneously</strong>
</p>
<ul>
<li>When the enabled parameter in watermark_info is set to true during parameter input, a watermarked result can be generated simultaneously.</li>
<li>The watermark_url parameter of the returned result is the watermarked version.</li>
<li>Currently, only some APIs support watermarking. For details, please refer to the current API documentation.</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="2026.01.16" tabindex="-1">2026.01.16</h2>
<p>
<strong>Video Generation | Video Effects | New Feature</strong>
</p>

</li>

<h2 id="2025.12.22" tabindex="-1">2025.12.22</h2>
<p>
<strong>Video Generation | Motion Control Launched</strong>
</p>
<ul>
<li>Based on the new API path, both reference images and reference videos need to be uploaded simultaneously.</li>
<li>Supports standard mode and high-quality mode. When generating standard mode videos, 0.5 points are deducted per second, and when generating high-quality mode videos, 0.8 points are deducted per second. The seconds are rounded to the nearest integer.</li>
<li>The upper limit of the reference video duration is related to the orientation of the generated video characters: up to 30 seconds when consistent with the reference video, and only 10 seconds when consistent with the reference image.</li>
<li>Action libraries are not currently supported.</li>
</ul>

<p>

</p>

</ul>
<p>
<strong>Video Generation | V1.5 and V1.6 models support video extension</strong>
</p>
<ul>
<li>Videos generated based on V1.5 and V1.6 models can be continued for 4-5 seconds after writing</li>
<li>If the video is generated using “last frame only”, continue writing the content of the previous 4-5 seconds</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="2025.3.25" tabindex="-1">2025.3.25</h2>
<p>
<strong>Image Generation | V1.5 model supports character feature reference and character appearance reference</strong>
</p>
<ul>
<li>Selecting Face as reference: you can keep the face consistent with the reference image, and use prompt to change other components like the outfit and the background; great for single-character consistency across different looks</li>
<li>Selecting Subject as reference: you can set the entire subject as reference, and even fine-tune the reference level on the face and the subject; great for keeping the appearance of the character consistent across different scenes</li>
</ul>

<h2 id="2025.3.12" tabindex="-1">2025.3.12</h2>

</p>

</ul>

</p>

</ul>

</p>
<ul>
<li>Supports lip-syncing for any 1080p or 720p video within 10s</li>

</ul>
<p>
<strong>Image Generation | Support V1.5 models</strong>
</p>
<ul>
<li>Improved aesthetics: better composition and lighting, especially more aesthetically pleasing in portraits</li>
<li>Improved image quality: enhanced fidelity in details, more natural rendering, and stronger tonal contrast</li>
<li>Support 21:9 aspect ratio</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="2025.3.5" tabindex="-1">2025.3.5</h2>
<p>
<strong>Video Generation | New Feature: Creative Video Effects</strong>
</p>
<ul>
<li>Launch of “Dual-character Effects”: 3 types available, “hug”, “kiss”, and “heart_gesture”.</li>
<li>Includes create task, query task (single), and query task (list) interfaces</li>
</ul>
<div class="highlight-block">
<div class="highlight-block-icon">💡</div>
<div class="highlight-block-content">
<p>Compared to the general video generation API, the video effects API provides more flexible calling parameters and integrates pre- and post-processing functionalities tailored for video effects (e.g., dual-character effects). For example, it allows users to input two portrait images, automatically stitches them into a single composite image, and generates the video using the stitched image. This makes the API more flexible and efficient.</p>
</div>
</div>
<h2 id="2025.2.14" tabindex="-1">2025.2.14</h2>
<p>
<strong>Image Generation | The “model” field has been changed to “model_name”</strong>
</p>
<div class="highlight-block">
<div class="highlight-block-icon">💡</div>
<div class="highlight-block-content">
<p>Please note that in order to maintain naming consistency, the original model field has been changed to model_name, so in the future, please use this field to specify the version of the model that needs to be called.=</p>
<ul>
<li>At the same time, we keep the behavior forward-compatible, if you continue to use the original model field, it will not have any impact on the interface call, there will not be any exception, which is equivalent to the default behavior when model_name is empty (i.e., call the V1 model).</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
<h2 id="2025.1.7" tabindex="-1">2025.1.7</h2>
<p>
<strong>Video Generation | V1.6 Model Officially Launched</strong>
</p>
<ul>
<li>Supports text-to-video STD mode, image-to-video STD mode, and image-to-video PRO mode</li>
<li>Currently does not support tail frame, motion brushes, camera control, and other control features</li>
</ul>
<div class="highlight-block">
<div class="highlight-block-icon">💡</div>
<div class="highlight-block-content">
<p>Please note that in order to maintain naming consistency, the original model field has been changed to model_name, so in the future, please use this field to specify the version of the model that needs to be called.</p>
<ul>
<li>At the same time, we keep the behavior forward-compatible, if you continue to use the original model field, it will not have any impact on the interface call, there will not be any exception, which is equivalent to the default behavior when model_name is empty (i.e., call the V1 model).</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
<h2 id="2024.12.30" tabindex="-1">2024.12.30</h2>
<p>
<strong>Virtual Try-On | New V1.5 model</strong>
</p>
<ul>
<li>V1.5 model is a comprehensive upgrade of V1.0 model</li>
<li>V1.5 model supports single clothing (upper, lower, and dress dress) try-on, as well as “upper + lower” combination try-on</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="2024.12.23" tabindex="-1">2024.12.23</h2>
<p>
<strong>Video Generation | New Feature: Lip-Sync</strong>
</p>
<ul>
<li>Videos generated by the Video V1.0 model and Video V1.5 model support lip-sync as long as the video meets the facial requirements</li>
<li>Includes create task, query task (single), and query task (list) interfaces</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="2024.12.9" tabindex="-1">2024.12.9</h2>
<p>
<strong>Video Generation | Video V1.5 Std Model Now Open for Video Generation: Image-to-Video Functionality Enabled, Text-to-Video Unsupported</strong>
</p>
<ul>
<li>Supports standard mode</li>
<li>Tail frame control is not supported</li>
<li>All other parameters are supported</li>
</ul>
<div class="highlight-block">
<div class="highlight-block-icon">💡</div>
<div class="highlight-block-content">
<p>Please note that in order to maintain naming consistency, the original model field has been changed to model_name, so in the future, please use this field to specify the version of the model that needs to be called.</p>
<ul>
<li>At the same time, we keep the behavior forward-compatible, if you continue to use the original model field, it will not have any impact on the interface call, there will not be any exception, which is equivalent to the default behavior when model_name is empty (i.e., call the V1 model).</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
<h2 id="2024.12.2" tabindex="-1">2024.12.2</h2>
<p>
<strong>Video Generation | Capability Map</strong>
</p>
<ul>
<li>With multiple versions of the video generation model (V1, V1.5) and various plugin capabilities (e.g., camera control, start/end frame, motion brush, video extension, etc.), we have created a <strong>“Capability Map”</strong> to make it easier for everyone to visually check the availability of different versions and features. For details, please refer to the “3-0 Capability Map.”</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="2024.11.29" tabindex="-1">2024.11.29</h2>
<p>
<strong>Video Generation - ImageToVideo | New Feature: Motion Brush</strong>
</p>
<ul>
<li>This feature is only supported in Standard Mode 5s and Professional Mode 5s for the V1.0 model, and is currently not available for the V1.5 model.</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="2024.11.15" tabindex="-1">2024.11.15</h2>
<p>
<strong>Video Generation | Video V1.5 Pro Model Now Open for Video Generation: Image-to-Video Functionality Enabled, Text-to-Video Unsupported</strong>
</p>
<ul>
<li>Only supports professional mode</li>
<li>Tail frame control is not supported</li>
<li>All other parameters are supported</li>
</ul>
<p>
<strong>Video Generation | New Feature: Video Extension</strong>
</p>
<ul>
<li>Supports extending videos generated by the V1.0 model directly, adding 4-5 seconds of video length per extension</li>
<li>Includes create task, query task (single), and query task (list) interfaces</li>
</ul>
<p>
<strong>Video Generation | Other Updates</strong>
</p>
<ul>
<li>Added “external_task_id” field, allowing you to customize a task ID when creating a task, and query the video using this custom ID when needed</li>
</ul>
<div class="highlight-block">
<div class="highlight-block-icon">💡</div>
<div class="highlight-block-content">
<p>Please note that in order to maintain naming consistency, the original model field has been changed to model_name, so in the future, please use this field to specify the version of the model that needs to be called.</p>
<ul>
<li>At the same time, we keep the behavior forward-compatible, if you continue to use the original model field, it will not have any impact on the interface call, there will not be any exception, which is equivalent to the default behavior when model_name is empty (i.e., call the V1 model).</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
<h2 id="2024.10.30" tabindex="-1">2024.10.30</h2>
<p>Added the “Query Resource Package List and Remaining Quantity” interface for your convenience. See “Section VI: Account Information Query”.</p>
<h2 id="2024.10.25" tabindex="-1">2024.10.25</h2>
<p>To ensure information security, <strong>generated images/videos will be cleared after 30 days</strong>. Please make sure to save them promptly.</p>
<h2 id="2024.10.15" tabindex="-1">2024.10.15</h2>
<p>Add a sample <strong>Java</strong> code for generating the API_Token.</p>
<h2 id="2024.9.19" tabindex="-1">2024.9.19</h2>
<p>Video Generation When creating a task, the character limit for the <strong>prompt</strong> and <strong>negative_prompt</strong> in the request parameters has been updated to: cannot exceed 2500 characters.</p>
<h2 id="2024.9.19-1" tabindex="-1">2024.9.19</h2>
<p>Officially supporting the “<strong>AI Virtual Try-on</strong>” related API (<strong>kolors-virtual-try-on</strong>).</p>

Update Announcement 2026.02.11 Video Generation | Video Effects | New Feature Launch of 10 new video effects: snow_night_kiss, eternal_kiss, fortune_in_motion, chinese_trend, sedan_chair_dance, skyfall, good_luck_dance, laicai_dance, yangge_dance, and horse_year_dance For video effects details, refer to: Video Effects Center 2026.02.04 Video Generation | Video Effects | New Feature Launch of 8 new video effects: unique_firework, palm_sized_figure, color_mixing, lantern_festival_cuju, tangyuan_to_animal, etc For video effects details, refer to: Video Effects Center 2026.02.03 Video Generation | Video Effects | New Feature Launch of 9 new video effects: hot_feet_dance, swag_dance, pigeon_dance, chanel_dance, city_to_village, etc For video effects details, refer to: Video Effects Center 2026.01.27 Video Generation | Video Effects | New Feature Launch of 7 new video effects: new_year_feast, ring_in_new, pet_vlogger, crystal_horse, lateral_shift_transitionl,horse_year_firework, etc​​ For video effects details, refer to: Video Effects Center 2026.01.23 General | New Capability: Supports intelligent completion of images from different angles of the element Through the front view of the element, other angle images of the element can be automatically inferred, and three sets of results can be generated for selection each time. Charged based on the times of service visits, with 0.5 units deducted per visit. General | New Capability: When querying the task results, you can directly obtain the units consumed by the current task The key of JSON parameter is: final_unit_deduction. General | New feature: When generating images or videos, a watermark can be added simultaneously When the enabled parameter in watermark_info is set to true during parameter input, a watermarked result can be generated simultaneously. The watermark_url parameter of the returned result is the watermarked version. Currently, only some APIs support watermarking. For details, please refer to the current API documentation. 2026.01.16 Video Generation | Video Effects | New Feature Launch of 31 new video effects: drunk_dance, daoma_dance, lion_dance, lucky_money_come, phantom_jewel, zoom_out, etc​​ For video effects details, refer to: Video Effects Center 2025.12.22 Video Generation | Motion Control Launched Based on the new API path, both reference images and reference videos need to be uploaded simultaneously. Supports standard mode and high-quality mode. When generating standard mode videos, 0.5 points are deducted per second, and when generating high-quality mode videos, 0.8 points are deducted per second. The seconds are rounded to the nearest integer. The upper limit of the reference video duration is related to the orientation of the generated video characters: up to 30 seconds when consistent with the reference video, and only 10 seconds when consistent with the reference image. Action libraries are not currently supported. 2025.12.18 Video Generation | Video Effects | New Feature Launch of 16 new video effects: cheers_2026, countdown_teleport, santa_random_surprise, birthday_star, etc​​ Notice:kiss,fight,hug,thumbs_up,tiger_hug,pet_lion, 3d_cartoon_1 will be discontinued on January 30, 2026 For video effects details, refer to: Video Effects Center 2025.12.16 Video Generation | V2.6 model upgraded By using prompt and voice_list, a specified voice can be used to generate videos: 6 units will be deducted for 5 seconds, and 12 units will be deducted for 10 seconds. Supports voice customization and can also use system preset voice. 2025.12.15 Video Generation | V2.6 model launched Supports Text-To-Video and Image-To-Video. Control whether to include audio when generating videos through the sound parameter. Video Generation | Omni-Video model launched New API, multiple feature can be achieved through prompt words alone. Image Generation | Omni-Image model launched New API, multiple feature can be achieved through prompt words alone. 2025.12.11 Video Generation | Video Effects | New Feature Launch of 20 new Christmas, Video Effects | New Feature: bloombloom & dizzydizzy (Single Image Effect) Launch of “Single Image Effects”: 2 types available, bloombloom, dizzydizzy includes create task, query task (single), and query task (list) interfaces 2025.3.31 Video Generation | V1.6 model supports generating videos from end frame V1.6 model PRO mode can be used to generate video footage of the first few seconds of an image based on the image Video Generation | V1.5 and V1.6 models support video extension Videos generated based on V1.5 and V1.6 models can be continued for 4-5 seconds after writing If the video is generated using “last frame only”, continue writing the content of the previous 4-5 seconds 2025.3.25 Image Generation | V1.5 model supports character feature reference and character appearance reference Selecting Face as reference: you can keep the face consistent with the reference image, and use prompt to change other components like the outfit and the background; great for single-character consistency across different looks Selecting Subject as reference: you can set the entire subject as reference, and even fine-tune the reference level on the face and the subject; great for keeping the appearance of the character consistent across different scenes 2025.3.18 Video Generation - Video Effects | New Feature: Single Image Effect Launch of “Single Image Effects”: 2 types available, squish, expansion Includes create task, query task (single), and query task (list) interfaces Video Generation | New models supports start/end frame, end frame, motion brush, camera control V1.5 Model PRO mode supports start/end frame, end frame, motion brush, camera control(simple only) V1.6 Model PRO mode supports start/end frame Video Generation | Lip-syncing supports customized videos and more available tones Supports lip-syncing for any 1080p or 720p video within 10s Added 8 new Chinese and English tones that can be used directly to dub lip-sync videos Image Generation | Support V1.5 models Improved aesthetics: better composition and lighting, especially more aesthetically pleasing in portraits Improved image quality: enhanced fidelity in details, more natural rendering, and stronger tonal contrast Support 21:9 aspect ratio 2025.3.5 Video Generation | New Feature: Creative Video Effects Launch of “Dual-character Effects”: 3 types available, “hug”, “kiss”, and “heart_gesture”. Includes create task, query task (single), and query task (list) interfaces 💡 Compared to the general video generation API, the video effects API provides more flexible calling parameters and integrates pre- and post-processing functionalities tailored for video effects (e.g., dual-character effects). For example, it allows users to input two portrait images, automatically stitches them into a single composite image, and generates the video using the stitched image. tailored for video effects (e.g., dual-character effects).
